entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS365) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD SUBMISSION ADDS THREE (3) SEDS TO THE AT&T NETWORX CONTRACT SUPPORTING NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1724.01E. 2. TO ADD SIX (6) SEDS TO THE AT&T NETWORX CONTRACT SUPPORTING NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1747.01E. 3. TO ADD EIGHT (8) SEDS TO THE AT&T NETWORX CONTRACT SUPPORTING NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1750.01E. 4. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 5. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS366) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD ACCESS 3 AND 4MPBS SHARED ETHERNET -SWC, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1722.01E. 2. TO ADD TWENTY (20) SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1754.01E. 3. TO REDUCE THE PRICE ON ONE (1) SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1758.01P. 4. TO ADD A MMRC CLIN TO THE AT&T NETWORX CONTRACT SUPPORTING NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1759.01E. 5. TO ADD 48 MONTH DMRC OPTION TO SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1760.01S 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS367) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD ONE DEDICATED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1726.01E. 2. TO ADD ONE (1) SED TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1751.01E. 3. TO ADD SIX (6) WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1752.02E. 4. TO ADD ONE (1) SED TO THE AT&T NETWORX CONTRACT SUPPORTING NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1755.01E. 5. TO ADD EIGHT (8) WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1762.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

TO ADD ONE (1) SED TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1768.01S. 7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 8. ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD 10GBPS DEDICATED ETHERNET AND CRITICAL ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1766.01E. 2. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 3. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF FIFTEEN (15) CISCO SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1764.01E. 2. ADDITION OF TWO (2) CISCO SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1771.01E. 3. CORRECTIVE MODIFICATION, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1774.01S. 4. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 5. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1729.01E. 2. TO ADD SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1731.01E. 3. TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1769.01E. 4. TO ADD SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1775.01E. 5. TO ADD SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1761.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS372) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD TWELVE (12 SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1777.01E. 2. TO ADD MULTIPLE SPEEDS SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1772.01E. 3. TO ADD 10MPBS SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1770.01E. 4. TO ADD MANAGED EQUIPMENT SERVICE (MES) CLINS FOR MNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1756.01E. 5. TO ADD THREE (3) SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1767.02E. 6. TO ADD SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1773.01E. 7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 8. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS373) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD FOURTEEN (14) WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1776.01E. 2. TO ADD SEVEN (7) SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1778.01E. 3. TO ADD ONE (1) WIRELINE SED TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1779.01E. 4. TO ADD TWELVE (12) SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1781.01E. 5. TO ADD 600MPBS DEDICATED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1782.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
